memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_FilterBiquad *f, q16_t b0, q16_t b1, q16_t b2, q16_t a1, q16_t a2)
memberdef.name: syn_filter_biquad_init

briefdescription.para: Initialize a biquad filter with raw coefficients.
Reset biquad filter delay lines to zero.
Process a single sample through the biquad filter.

detaileddescription.para: Uses 64-bit intermediate calculations to prevent overflows.
Computes standard Butterworth coefficients in Q16.16.
Computes standard Butterworth highpass coefficients in Q16.16.

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_FilterBiquad *f, q16_t fc, q16_t fs, q16_t q)
memberdef.name: syn_filter_biquad_bandpass

detaileddescription.para: Constant-skirt-gain bandpass. Peak gain = 1.0 at center frequency.

parameterdescription.para: Quality factor in Q16.16 (higher = narrower band).

memberdef.argsstring: (SYN_FilterBiquad *f, q16_t fc, q16_t fs, q16_t q)
memberdef.name: syn_filter_biquad_notch

detaileddescription.para: Rejects frequencies near fc, passes all others.

parameterdescription.para: Quality factor in Q16.16 (higher = narrower notch).
